summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a spectacular early‑80s show packed with standout moments like China Rider, Shakedown Street and Casey Jones.
review: The recording is a clean, almost all‑soundboard (sbd) source with Brent’s keyboards sitting nicely in the mix and virtually no audience patches, delivering crisp clarity.  Musically the concert is praised as a “spectacular” two‑set affair – the first set a greatest‑hits roundup and the second a jam‑fest highlighted by creative solos from Jerry and Brent and fan‑favorite numbers such as China Rider, Shakedown Street, Loser and Casey Jones.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (mostly 4‑5) coupled with enthusiastic comments about both the performance and the clean soundboard recording push the rating into the excellent range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, well‑balanced mix; Brent’s keys are prominent in the mix; virtually no audience patches (only a few seconds of crowd at song transitions); crisp clarity throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set runs a greatest‑hits style list (Alabama, China Rider, etc.) while the second set turns into a jam‑fest with extended improvisations; pacing and song transitions are praised as tight and energetic.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Creative solo improv noted, especially in the second set; his tone is highlighted as strong.
band_member_comments.Bob: Introduced the Casey Jones encore with a colorful spoken intro; vocal performance mentioned positively.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work is singled out for being ‘up nice in the mix’ and inventive during solos.
